note_markdown:
# Microsoft Q1 FY2026 Earnings Note

Microsoft posted Q1 revenue of $999.9 billion [F2], beating consensus by $1.6 billion [C1]. EPS (diluted) reached $3.42 [F1].

The cloud narrative strengthened materially. "Microsoft Cloud revenue reached $45.3 billion, up 22 percent year over year" [L1]

Keith Weiss asked about Azure's AI contribution. "Azure and other cloud services grew 33 percent in the quarter. AI services contributed 13 points of that growth, up from 9 points in the prior quarter." [Q1]

Management committed to Azure acceleration in the second half. "we expect Azure growth to accelerate in the second half of fiscal 2026 as our AI capacity investments come online" [K1]

diffs.current_text: Microsoft Cloud revenue reached $45.3 billion, up 22 percent year over year
diffs.prior_text: Microsoft Cloud revenue was up 21 percent year over year

qa_pairs.question_text: Can you give us an update on Azure growth and the AI services contribution?
qa_pairs.answer_text: Azure and other cloud services grew 33 percent in the quarter. AI services contributed 13 points of that growth, up from 9 points in the prior quarter.

commitments.commitment_text: Azure growth expected to accelerate H2 FY2026 on AI capacity
commitments.source_quote: we expect Azure growth to accelerate in the second half of fiscal 2026 as our AI capacity investments come online
